title: E-vaping device including e-vaping case with sliding mechanism for initiating vapor generation
abstract: An e-vaping case (100) comprising: a housing (120, 125); a guide structure that extends between a first surface (110) of the housing and a second surface (115) of the housing; a cartridge receiving portion connected to the guide structure, the cartridge receiving portion configured to be moved along the guide structure between the first surface and the second surface of the housing; and an electronics system (200) in the housing, the electronics system (200) including a power supply that is configured to initiate a transfer of power to an electrical contact structure (245) if the cartridge receiving portion is moved towards the first surface (115) of the housing to at least a first position of the housing, the electronics system (200) being configured to interrupt the transfer of power to the electrical contact structure (245) if the cartridge receiving portion is moved towards the second surface (115) of the housing .
claims:
Claims 1 . An e-vaping case comprising: a housing; a guide structure that extends between a first surface of the housing and a second surface of the housing; a cartridge receiving portion connected to the guide structure, the cartridge receiving portion configured to be moved along the guide structure between the first surface and the second surface of the housing; and an electronics system in the housing, the electronics system including a power supply that is configured to initiate a transfer of power to an electrical contact structure if the cartridge receiving portion is moved towards the first surface of the housing to at least a first position of the housing, the electronics system being configured to interrupt the transfer of power to the electrical contact structure if the cartridge receiving portion is moved towards the second surface of the housing. 2. The e-vaping case of claim 1 , wherein the guide structure is a sliding mechanism in the housing, the housing defines a cavity, the electronics system is in the cavity, the sliding mechanism includes a first plate, tracks, and a second plate in the housing, the tracks connect the first plate to the second plate, the cartridge receiving portion is connected to the first plate, and the cartridge receiving portion is configured to move bi-directionally between the first and second surfaces of the housing via the tracks. 3. The e-vaping case of claim 1 or claim 2, further comprising: a button attached to the housing, wherein the button is electrically connected to the electronics system, and the electronics system is configured to transfer power to the electrical contact structure using the power supply if the cartridge receiving portion is positioned at the first position of the housing and the button is pressed. 4. The e-vaping case of any one of claims 1 to 3, further comprising: a button structure connected to the cartridge receiving portion; and a switch sensor in the housing, wherein: the button structure is configured to contact the switch sensor if the cartridge receiving portion is moved to the first position in the housing; 

 the switch sensor is configured to depress momentarily if the cartridge receiving portion is moved past the first position to a second position in the housing; the second position in the housing is closer to the first surface of the housing than the first position in the housing; and the switch sensor is configured to snap back to the first position of the housing after being depressed momentarily. 5. The e-vaping case of claim 4, wherein the electronics system is configured to initiate the transfer of power to the electrical contact structure if the position of the button structure is adjusted to depress the switch sensor a plurality of times within a threshold period. 6. The e-vaping case of any of claims 3 to 5, wherein the electronics system is configured to terminate the transfer of power to the electrical contact structure using the power supply if the button is pressed longer than a threshold amount of time. 7. The e-vaping case of any of claims 1 to 6, wherein the e-vaping case does not include a puff sensor. 8. An electronic vaping device comprising: a housing; a guide structure that extends between a first surface of the housing and a second surface of the housing; a cartridge receiving portion connected to the guide structure, the cartridge receiving portion configured to be moved along the guide structure between the first surface and the second surface of the housing; an electronics system in the housing, the electronics system including an electrical contact structure and a power supply that is configured to initiate a transfer of power to the electrical contact structure if the cartridge receiving portion is moved towards the first surface of the housing to at least a first position of the housing, the electronics system being configured to interrupt the transfer of power to the electrical contact structure if the cartridge receiving portion is moved towards the second surface of the housing; and a cartridge on the cartridge receiving portion, the cartridge being configured to be detachably coupled to the cartridge receiving portion and to be electrically connected to the electrical contact structure. 9. The electronic vaping device of claim 8, wherein the guide structure is a sliding mechanism in the housing, the housing defines a cavity, the electronics system is in the cavity, the sliding mechanism includes a first plate, tracks, and a second plate in the housing, the tracks connect the first plate to the second plate, the cartridge receiving portion is connected to the first plate, and the cartridge receiving portion is configured to move bi-directionally between the first and second surfaces of the housing via the tracks. 10. The electronic vaping device of claim 8 or claim 9, further comprising: a button attached to the housing, wherein the button is electrically connected to the electronics system, and the electronics system is configured to transfer power to the electrical contact structure using the power supply if the cartridge receiving portion is positioned at the first position of the housing and the button is pressed. 1 1 . The electronic vaping device of any of claims 8 to 10, further comprising: a button structure connected to the cartridge receiving portion; and a switch sensor in the housing, wherein: the button structure is configured to contact the switch sensor if the cartridge receiving portion is moved to the first position in the housing; the switch sensor is configured to depress momentarily if the cartridge receiving portion is moved past the first position to a second position in the housing; the second position in the housing is closer to the first surface of the housing than the first position in the housing; and the switch sensor is configured to snap back to the first position of the housing after being depressed momentarily. 12. The electronic vaping device of claim 1 1 , wherein the electronics system is configured to initiate the transfer of power to the electrical contact structure if the position of the button structure is adjusted to depress the switch sensor a plurality of times within a threshold period. 13. The electronic vaping device of claims 10 to 12, wherein the electronics system is configured to terminate the transfer of power to the electrical contact structure using the power supply if the button is pressed longer than a threshold amount of time. 14. The electronic vaping device of any of claims 8 to 13, wherein the electronic vaping device does not include a puff sensor. 15. A method of making an e-vaping case, comprising: arranging a guide structure between a first surface of a housing and a second surface of the housing; connecting a cartridge receiving portion to the guide structure, the cartridge receiving portion being configured to be moved along the guide structure between the first surface and the second surface of the housing; and arranging an electronics system in the housing, the electronics system including a power supply that is configured to initiate a transfer of power to an electrical contact structure if the cartridge receiving portion is moved towards the first surface of the housing to at least a first position of the housing, and the electronics system being configured to interrupt the transfer of power to the electrical contact structure if the cartridge receiving portion is moved towards the second surface of the housing. 16. The method of claim 15, wherein the guide structure is a sliding mechanism in the housing, the housing defines a cavity, the electronics system is in the cavity, the sliding mechanism includes a first plate, tracks, and a second plate in the housing, the tracks connect the first plate to the second plate, the cartridge receiving portion is connected to the first plate, and the cartridge receiving portion is configured to move bi-directionally between the first and second surfaces of the housing via the tracks.
